diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,124 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Defines the Hono class that extends HonoBase and sets up routing with a default SmartRouter containing RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema.
+- Simple note: Entry point class for creating Hono applications with configurable routing and options.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Provides the core Hono class functionality including HTTP method handling, routing, request handling, and middleware composition.
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, ErrorHandler, compose, Context, Request, METHOD, get, post, put, delete, patch, options, all, on, onError, getEnv, addRoute, setReporter, withBasePath, getPath, initParams, methodNotAllowed, handleInput, handleEvent, handleError, BlankEnv.
+- Simple note: Base implementation containing all HTTP verbs, middleware, and request lifecycle handling.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Exports the PatternRouter router implementation.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Router factory/index file.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements PatternRouter that compiles path patterns into regular expressions for fast matching at runtime.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, emptyParams, Route<T>, add, match, buildRegExFromPath, exec.
+- Simple note: Converts path patterns to regex at initialization time for fast O(n) matching at request time.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Exports the LinearRouter router implementation.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Router factory/index file.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements LinearRouter that stores routes in a linear array and checks them sequentially on every request.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, emptyParams, ROUTES_LOOP, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, add, match, addMiddleware, handleMethodNotAllowError, parseParamToLabel.
+- Simple note: Simple linear route lookup with early-exit strategy for static routes and special handling for wildcards and param routes.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Exports the RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter router implementations.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter.
+- Simple note: Router factory/index files.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements RegExpRouter that builds regular expression matchers from routes for efficient runtime matching.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Router, Params, Result, ParamIndexMap, Handler, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, PATH_ERROR, Trie, emptyParam, match, buildAllMatchers, buildWildcardRegExp, clearWildcardRegExpCache, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, preprocessRoutes, buildRegExp, findMiddleware.
+- Simple note: Two-phase router that preprocesses routes and builds regex patterns for fast O(1) lookup with fallback to TrieRouter via PreparedRegExpRouter.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines matcher types and provides matching logic for regexp-based route matching.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, emptyParam, match, match, MethodNotAllowedHandler, METHOD_NAME_ALL.
+- Simple note: Contains type definitions and the main match function that tries regex match first, falls back to static map lookup.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements PreparedRegExpRouter that pre-computes relocation maps for static routes after initial build.
+- Names notice: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, RegExpRouter, StaticMap, buildAllMatchers, buildAndExportAllMatchers, serializeInitParams, buildInitParams, buildRelocationMap.
+- Simple note: Optimizes RegExpRouter by pre-resolving static routes in prepare phase for faster subsequent matches.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Implements a trie Node class for organizing routes in a prefix tree structure.
+- Names noticed: Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, PathSegment, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, PATH_ERROR, compareKey, search, insert, match, hasChildren, getChildren, getParamAssoc, getPath, buildRegExp, buildRegExpFromPath, buildRegExpFromStaticPath, buildRegExpFromStaticSegment, buildRegExpFromWildcardSegment.
+- Simple note: Trie node with child management, route insertion, path searching, and regex construction for wildcard segments.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class that manages prefix tree structure from routes and builds regular expressions from the trie.
+- Names noticed: Trie, ReplacementMap, Context, ParamAssocArray, Node, buildRegExp, buildRegExpFromStaticPath, groups, tokens, mark, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap.
+- Simple note: Builds a trie from routes, marks terminal nodes, and constructs regex with parameter capture groups from the trie topology.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Exports the SmartRouter router implementation.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Router factory/index file.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements SmartRouter that adaptively uses sub-routers (RegExpRouter and TrieRouter) based on known route patterns.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, Params, Result, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, ROUTES_CACHE, ROUTES_CACHE_LIMIT, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, add, tryMatch, match, addMiddleware, buildAllRouters, buildCachedRoutes, addRouteToRouter, addRouteToCache.
+- Simple note: Caching router that classifies routes dynamically, using RegExpRouter for dynamic routes and TrieRouter for static routes, switches to TrieRouter after caching limit.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Exports the TrieRouter router implementation.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Router factory/index file.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements TrieRouter that searches routes in a trie (prefix tree) structure.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Router, Node, Params, Result, checkOptionalParameter, add, match, hasChildren, getLeafRoute, path, prefix, insert, find.
+- Simple note: Tree-based route storage with O(n) search and O(1) average lookup once routes are inserted.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Provides test infrastructure for runner tests including suite hierarchy extraction and test execution.
+- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, runner, runTest, Params, Router, Task, Suite, task, suite, match, expect.
+- Simple note: Test utilities for running router match tests dynamically from test suite definitions.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests PatternRouter for correct route registration and matching.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, route, add, matchRoute.
+- Simple note: Test cases verify pattern matching, wildcard handling, and unsupported path patterns.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests LinearRouter for correct route registration and matching.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, route, add, matchRoute.
+- Simple note: Test cases verify linear route matching, wildcard handling, param route handling, and unsupported patterns.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests RegExpRouter for correct route registration, matching, and edge cases.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, route, add, matchRoute, matchParams, wildcardRoute, patternRoute, staticRoute, catchAllRoute.
+- Simple note: Comprehensive tests for regex-based matching including wildcards, param paths, static paths, nested routes, and method matching.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests SmartRouter for correct adaptive routing between sub-routers.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest, route, add, matchRoute.
+- Simple note: Tests that SmartRouter correctly delegates to RegExpRouter or TrieRouter based on route patterns and caching behavior.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests TrieRouter for correct trie-based route insertion and matching.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, route, add, matchRoute.
+- Simple note: Basic tests for trie-based routing with static paths, param paths, and nested routes.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests Node class trie operations including insert, search, and buildRegExp.
+- Names noticed: Node, insert, search, getChildren, path, prefix, buildRegExp, matchStaticChild, matchWildcardChild, matchParamChild, matchRegExChild.
+- Simple note: Unit tests for low-level trie node operations covering leaf matching, prefix matching, wildcard matching, param matching, and regex matching at each node.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts exports index, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts implements PatternRouter with regex pattern compilation
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts exports index, src/router/linear-router/router.ts implements LinearRouter with linear array routing
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts exports index, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts implements RegExpRouter, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts provides matcher utilities, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts provides optimized variant, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts implements trie Node, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts implements Trie tree
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts exports index, src/router/smart-router/router.ts implements SmartRouter with adaptive routing
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts exports index, src/router/trie-router/router.ts implements TrieRouter, src/router/trie-router/node.ts implements trie Node, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts tests Node class, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts tests TrieRouter

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a benchmark artifact document for a routing-read-write-ledger task. I need to:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read all the files listed (23 files total)
3. Create a markdown file with specific structure:
   - Titl
